name: depmap
tagline: Python reference + workflows for querying the Broad Institute's public DepMap API and data downloads for cancer gene-dependency analysis.
verdict: Clean, single-purpose scientific skill. All network calls target official depmap.org/figshare endpoints for public research data, no credentials are read or requested, no shell execution of fetched code, nothing obfuscated or hidden. Minor nits: thin error handling, undeclared Python deps, and one placeholder download URL — cosmetic, not a safety issue. Safe

highlights.summary: No explicit 'do not use when' guidance (e.g., non-cancer contexts, need for RNA-seq raw data) is given anywhere in the file.
Individual functions document return shapes via docstrings/comments, but there is no overall output-contract statement for the skill (e.g., expected report/format), left to the invoking agent.

API helper functions (lines 68-96) do minimal error handling (raise_for_status only in depmap_get) and don't guide the user on handling 404s, rate limits, or missing files; the FILES dict (lines 114-1
